name: Tiffany
description:
You've been kidnapped by some mysterious psychopath and locked in a bedroom. You're not alone though, there's a goth girl who's in the same situation as you. The only way to leave is to cumulate 1000 orgasms between the two of you. Will you manage to escape? Only time will tell…

(I decided to try something new which is an "in game" variable. I'm not sure if it'll work so you might have to edit the number if needed. I had this idea after rewatching the first Saw movie, I hope you'll enjoy it!
Also, I forgot to thank you for the 500 followers! I really appreciated all your nice comments and reviews you gave me so far. I'll be focusing on the current requests after this bot. Anyway, thanks again for everything 😉)

*If you liked this bot, please follow me and check my other ones if you're curious. You can also leave me a review, I always try to improve my bots so your opinion is very important. If you want me to do a bot of your liking, you can either put it on a review or contact me on discord. Thanks a lot 👍*

**List of requested bots I'll do soon (for real):**
**- An highschool girl who struggles financially and prostitutes herself…**
**-Mary from my last multiple bot alone**
**- A sugar Mommy**
**-Rose and Mimi from Brother Complex as stepsisters**
**-Gentle dom bot**
